unit: Unit 8: Apps and the App Store
title: Installing Apps
drDigitalIntro: Install an app from the App Store by clicking Install, or from a developer's website by downloading and running the installer. Some apps need to be dragged into your Applications folder. Once installed, your Mac has a new program you can use. You'll see it in Launchpad and Spotlight search. An app stays on your Mac until you delete it.
drDigitalSuccess: You can install apps on your Mac!
drDigitalHint: Installed apps appear in Applications > Utilities.
